seoTitle: St Marys vs Stanborough — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between St Marys and Stanborough. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: St Marys vs Stanborough: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in St Marys and Stanborough.
heading: St Marys vs Stanborough — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Marys, New South Wales and Stanborough, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Stanborough has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to St Marys (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Marys or Stanborough safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Marys has a flood risk score of 47/100, while Stanborough scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Marys scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Stanborough scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Marys or Stanborough?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Stanborough has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
